description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a light wood finish and a white backing panel. The front features a combination of open shelves and cubby compartments of varying sizes, with a larger vertical section on the left for storing taller items. The sides and back are solid, with the back panel extending slightly above the shelving structure. The unit stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the shelves are open for easy access. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for organizing items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with open compartments and a white back panel, designed for organized storage. The structure is modern, with multiple shelves and a large vertical cubby.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple open shelves and cubbies, with a large vertical compartment on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid white back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and depth.
